message:
docs: add API doc comments to stream combinators and terminals

Add concise C-style doc comments to the following stream API functions
in include/asx/stream/stream.h:

Combinators:
- asx_stream_filter_map_init: filter-map stream wrapping an inner stream
- asx_stream_take_while_init: take-while stream with predicate control
- asx_stream_scan_init: scan stream with accumulating function
- asx_stream_peekable_init: peekable adapter wrapping an inner stream
- asx_stream_peek: poll next item without consuming it
- asx_stream_inspect_init: inspect stream observing items via callback

Terminals:
- asx_stream_any: short-circuit predicate check for any match
- asx_stream_all: short-circuit predicate check for all match
- asx_stream_collect: collect items into caller-provided buffer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
